arts.ttl: How to watch Hibernian vs Aberdeen with PPV option for crunch Scottish Premiership clash
arts.sum: It's a big game at both ends of the table struggling Hibs welcome Aberdeen

arts.ttl: Podcast: Hibs v Aberdeen preview & who is new Rangers CEO?
arts.sum: We look ahead to Hibs V Aberdeen and get the lowdown on new Rangers CEO Patrick Stewart.

arts.ttl: Is Hibs vs Aberdeen on TV? Live stream, channel, PPV and team news for Easter Road clash
arts.sum: The game is available on PPV via Hibs TV, with the club saying "International subscribers will get the full game live as part of their package, with no requirement to purchase the PPV option. Hibs vs Aberdeen is not on TV, but punters can still watch the game LIVE.

Second-placed Aberdeen travel to Edinburgh to take on Hibernian, bottom of the Scottish Premiership pile, at Easter Road on Tuesday night with the two teams 23 points apart. Hibs have played a league...

arts.ttl: Graeme Shinnie brands Aberdeen title talk 'madness' as he sets record straight over immediate aim
arts.sum: The Dons skipper is well aware of the title fever sweeping through the Granite City but knows things can change in an instant

arts.ttl: Hibs are Hearts' gift that keeps on giving but we MUST sort it out before they do or we're in big s*** - Ryan Stevenson
arts.sum: One of the only things that's giving the Hearts players a bit of leeway is the fact that Hibs are below us

arts.ttl: David Gray knows the Hibs sign that will spell real trouble as Easter Road boss adamant players are 'all in it together'
arts.sum: The Leith side can climb above rivals Hearts at the foot of the table if they hand Aberdeen a second successive defeat

arts.ttl: Graeme Shinnie backs Aberdeen to return to form but says he is 'wary' of Hibs threat
arts.sum: “I think if you reflect on games that they’ve had this season, they’ve been good and they’ve been five or 10 minutes away from being a lot higher up in the league,” he said. Jimmy Thelin’s side lost away from home to St Mirren in their first Scottish Premiership defeat of the season, bringing to an end their impressive 11-game unbeaten run in the league, which featured 10 wins.

arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin reveals his Aberdeen debrief message and what he wasn't happy about against St Mirren
arts.sum: A defeat on Paisley saw the Reds lose in the Premiership for the first time since last March

arts.ttl: David Gray defends Hibs winger Elie Youan after pundit's 'unacceptable' verdict
arts.sum: My information went on very quickly as to what we wanted to do at the red card, especially for the next five minutes, to see what Dundee would do, to be honest, because of how well we started in the game. “I think anyone who knows Eli Youan knows he loves football,” the manager said.
